items.name: Roman "Septimani" Scutum Shield
items.description:
For Pseudo-Comitatenses.

"I'm a lion pizza chicken!" - Clovis

"Say it again!" - Syagrius

The Septimani were one of the Gallic pseudo-comitatenses legions, and would be one of the two led by Syagrius. These men would have fought in the Battle of the Catalaunian Plains, and they were part of the Gallic army even after the fall of the Western Empire, being wiped out a few years after the Battle of Soissons.

Created by: Davicolt
Modeled by: Davicolt
Textured by: Davicolt/Erika

Support Davicolt's work! He is a very talented 3D modeler and deserves lots of credit.
